text:
When I was young I thought I wanted just lots lots moths. But that wasn't enough. So I got butterflies. That was great. Then I dreamed I could ride them. So I flew. But no moths. Just bright lights. I couldn't feel anything.

I saw this place where people rode animals. I couldn't get it out of my head. I could. Maybe I could.

I took my own stuff. Nothing much. I got onto my bike. Thought nothing. Just coasted.

Then I fell.

That was it.

I woke up.



That day.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
